title: selliguea elegans
intro: Selliguea elegans, also known as Polypodium elegans, is a type of fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of China, India, and the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selliguea elegans include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Selliguea elegans can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
